title: Halloween Costumes
scene: 十月底，你在派对用品店买万圣节服装。

turns.cn: 需要帮忙吗？今晚很多人买。
turns.en: Need help? It's busy tonight.

turns.cn: 有适合成人的吸血鬼套装吗？
turns.en: Do you have an adult vampire costume?

turns.cn: 中码在这，含披风和假牙。
turns.en: Medium is here. Cape and fangs included.
Do you sell face paint?
Aisle three. Get the waterproof kind.
I'll take a trick-or-treat bucket for my kid too.

turns.cn: 一共四十二块，祝你们玩得开心！
turns.en: Forty-two total. Have a spooky good time!

title: Trick or Treat
scene: 万圣节晚上，孩子在你家门口讨糖。

turns.en: Trick or treat!

turns.cn: 哇，好酷的宇航员！给你几块糖。
turns.en: Wow, cool astronaut! Here are some candies.
Thank you!

turns.cn: 记得只说一份，别拿太多哦。
turns.en: Just take one piece, okay?
Okay!

turns.cn: 晚上注意安全，让家长陪着。
turns.en: Stay safe tonight. Go with your parents.
Bye!

title: Christmas Shopping
scene: 十二月在商场买圣诞礼物。

turns.en: Would you like gift wrapping?
Yes, please. It's a scarf for my mom.
Red ribbon or gold?
Gold. Can you write a gift card?

turns.cn: 当然可以，请把祝福语告诉我。
turns.en: Sure. Tell me what to write.
Write Merry Christmas, love you.
All set. Wrapping is free.

title: Thanksgiving Dinner
scene: 感恩节你去朋友家，帮忙准备晚餐。

turns.cn: 火鸡还要烤一小时，先喝点？
turns.en: The turkey needs another hour. Want a drink?

turns.cn: 好的，我能帮忙摆桌子吗？
turns.en: Sure. Can I help set the table?
Silverware is in the cabinet. We need eight places.
I brought pumpkin pie. Where should I put it?

turns.cn: 厨房岛台，等会儿一起切。
turns.en: On the kitchen island. We'll slice it later.
Thanks for having me today.

turns.cn: 你才是一家人，开动前先说感恩词。
turns.en: You're family. We'll say what we're thankful for before we eat.

title: New Year Party
scene: 跨年夜你在朋友家倒计时。

turns.en: Five minutes till midnight!
Is the champagne ready?
It's chilled. Everyone grab a glass.

turns.cn: 新年快乐！祝你明年一切顺利！
turns.en: Happy New Year! Wish you all the best next year!
Happy New Year! Health and prosperity!
Let's do this again next year!
Definitely!

title: Buying a Christmas Tree
scene: 你在户外圣诞树摊挑选树。

turns.cn: 云杉还是冷杉？云杉便宜一点。
turns.en: Spruce or fir? Spruce is a bit cheaper.
Fir smells better. How tall is this one?

turns.cn: 六英尺，四十五块，帮你们绑车上。
turns.en: Six feet, forty-five dollars. We'll tie it to your car.
Do you sell tree stands?
Yes, twenty-five, right over here.
Okay, I'll take the tree and the stand.
Merry Christmas!
